title: Le Toy Van - Educational Wooden Toy Honeybake Ice Lollies Pretend Play Kids Playset | 6 Pieces - Great Gifts For A Boy Or Girl,10 cm x 13 cm x 10 cm
features: COLOURFUL EDUCATIONAL 6 PIECE ICE LOLLIES PLAYSET: The Educational Wooden Toy Honeybake Ice Lollies Pretend Play Kids Playset includes 6 wooden honeybake brightly painted ice lollies complete with sturdy wooden holder for convenient storage. This engaging pretend play experience offers kids a fun social alternative to screens.

ENCOURAGES CREATIVE IMAGINATION, SOCIAL AND LANGUAGE DEVELOPMENT AND COLOUR RECOGNITION: This bright and colourful scenario and role play toy encourages creative imagination, social and language development, as well as developing colour recognition stimulating your little one’s imagination.

NOSTALGIC BRIGHTLY PAINTED DESIGN: With it’s beautiful, creativity sparking, nostalgic design the Wooden Ice Lollies Playset enables kids to take happy memories and incorporate them into a positive play environment. A great fun gift for boys or girls ages 2 - 5 years old!

GREAT FOR INTERACTIVE PLAY: Kids love playing together with this fun, colourful scenario and role play toy food! The durably designed Wooden Ice Lollies pretend food playset develops and encourages your child to learn turn taking skills as well as social interaction.

HIGH QUALITY, ECO-FRIENDLY SAFE TOY: Wooden play food beautifully decorated with colourful non-toxic paints and tested to the highest safety standards. Made from durable, sustainable rubberwood, allowing long-lasting fun, whilst caring for our planet.
description: From the manufacturer IMAGINATIVE ROLE PLAY WOODEN TOYS We are Le Toy Van, designing nostalgic, unique role play, play foods, markets, kitchens wooden toys for a happy childhood, using only responsibly sourced materials from sustainably managed forests.
